title: Etsy Fee Calculator
metaTitle: Etsy Fee Calculator — Transaction, Processing & Offsite Ads (2025)
metaDescription: Calculate Etsy net profit after the 6.5% transaction fee, 3% + $0.25 payment processing, $0.20 listing fee, and offsite ads. Updated for 2025 Etsy fee schedule.

inputs.label: Item Price
inputs.helpText: The price of your item listed on Etsy (excluding shipping)

inputs.label: Product Cost (COGS)
inputs.helpText: Your cost to make or source the item — materials, supplies, or wholesale cost

inputs.label: Shipping Charged to Buyer
inputs.helpText: Shipping fee collected from buyer. Etsy charges its transaction fee on item + shipping amount.

inputs.label: Your Actual Shipping Cost
inputs.helpText: What you actually pay to ship the order

inputs.label: Sales from Offsite Ads (%)
inputs.helpText: Percentage of your sales that come through Etsy Offsite Ads. If enrolled and over $10K annual revenue, Etsy charges 12–15% on those sales.

inputs.label: Annual Revenue
inputs.helpText: Determines your Offsite Ads fee rate. Shops over $10K must participate at 12%.

inputs.label: Monthly Orders
inputs.helpText: Monthly order volume — used to calculate total monthly profit

formulaCitation: Etsy — Fees & Payments Policy (2025); Etsy — Offsite Ads policy and fee rates (2025)
formulaSource: Net Profit = Item Price − Transaction Fee (6.5% × fee base) − Processing Fee (3% + $0.25) − Listing Fee ($0.20) − Offsite Ads Fee − Actual Shipping − COGS; Fee base = Item Price + Shipping Charged
